description: The Libri 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a criminal organization in Calabria, Italy. Founded by brothers Domenico and Pasquale Libri in the 1950s, it is based in Reggio Calabria with a stronghold in the Cannavò district. The clan is involved in drug and arms trafficking, extortion, prostitution, and infiltration into public institutions. It reached its peak in the 1960s-1970s and remains active, considered one of the most aggressive 'ndrine in Reggio Calabria.
